rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is about mobile-vs-nonmobile review cues and effort/credibility mechanisms using TripAdvisor data and experiments, while the cited paper is a VAR study of WOM vs marketing customer acquisition and customer equity growth—methodologically and construct-wise quite different. The only linkage evidence provided is a single DOI match (reference_index 59) with no in-text citation context. Given this sparse evidence, it may be a background WOM citation, but it is not safe to drop as an obvious mention-only case.
